title: WynnMiata
description: A Wynncraft Raid Mod that trys to make your Raid experience better
body:
# Whats WynnMiata?
WynnMiata is a Wynncraft Raid Mod that offers QOL Features and Element Customization trying to make your Raid Expierence better

# Features
## Playerpreview
- Shows you stats of a Player
>- Character Selection
>- Raid Stats
>- Profesion Stats
>- Other Stats
## The Canyon Colossus
- Changes the Color of the Lava Puzzle
## Misc
- Armor Hiding
- Head Cosmetic Hiding
- Fire Hud Hiding
- Fire on Entitys Hiding
- TradeMarket Quick-Sell
- Profession Hud
- Armor Durability
- Accessory Durability
## Raid
- Show Player Raids
# Commands
```
/playerstats <raid> <Playername>
```
Shows you the Raid Completions of a specific player
# Keybinds
## Playerpreview
`Default: O`
## Settings
`Default: I`
